title: You may be saving for retirement without realising it. Here's how to check
summary: Many people may unknowingly have retirement savings through workplace programs or automatic enrollment. A simple check can help ensure you're not missing potential free money for retirement.
content: One simple check could ensure you are not missing out on free money which could help in later life.

zh.title: 你可能在不知不觉中为退休储蓄。以下是如何检查
zh.summary: 许多人可能通过工作场所项目或自动入选在不知不觉中拥有退休储蓄。一个简单的检查可以帮助确保你没有错过潜在的退休免费资金。

title: The Wegovy pill is still dominating the GLP-1 pill market
summary: Wegovy continues to dominate the weight-loss pill market despite competition from Eli Lilly's newly launched Foundayo. The drug remains the top choice among Americans seeking GLP-1 treatment.
content: It has remained a top choice among Americans trying to lose weight even after the launch of Foundayo, Eli Lilly’s GLP-1 pill.

zh.title: Wegovy药片仍然主导GLP-1减肥药市场
zh.summary: 尽管面临礼来公司新推出的Foundayo的竞争，Wegovy继续主导减肥药市场。该药物仍然是寻求GLP-1治疗的美国人的首选。

title: 'No dead ends': What the Dutch can teach us about tackling youth unemployment
summary: The Netherlands achieves one of the world's lowest rates of youth unemployment and disengagement among 16-24 year-olds. The Dutch approach offers valuable lessons for other countries tackling youth employment challenges.
content: The Netherlands has one of the world's lowest rates of 16 to 24-year-olds not in education, employment or training.

zh.title: "没有死路"：荷兰能教我们如何应对青年失业
zh.summary: 荷兰在16-24岁青年失业和脱离社会方面实现了世界上最低的比率之一。荷兰的做法为其他国家应对青年就业挑战提供了宝贵的经验。

title: How the High Street became a window on our political instability
summary: The UK's declining High Streets reflect broader economic and political challenges facing the nation. Retail decline serves as a visible indicator of underlying political and social instability.
content: High Streets have declined in recent years. What does this tell us about the UK?

zh.title: 高街如何成为我们政治不稳定的窗口
zh.summary: 英国衰退的高街反映了该国面临的更广泛的经济和政治挑战。零售业衰退是潜在政治和社会不稳定的可见指标。

title: Fragile ceasefire in jeopardy as Iran reportedly fires missiles at Israel
summary: Iran's missile strikes on Israel threaten to derail the fragile ceasefire in place since early April. The escalation risks reigniting broader regional conflict and destabilizing the agreement.
content: The fragile ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran has been in place since early April.

zh.title: 伊朗向以色列发射导弹，脆弱停火协议岌岌可危
zh.summary: 伊朗对以色列的导弹袭击威胁要破坏自4月初以来的脆弱停火。这种升级可能引发更广泛的地区冲突并威胁该协议的稳定。

title: No bags, no watch parties at Madison Square Garden with Trump attending Game 3 of the NBA Finals
summary: Trump confirmed he will attend Game 3 of the NBA Finals at Madison Square Garden, the first Finals game in New York since 1999. The venue has implemented special security measures for the high-profile appearance.
content: Trump is a longtime Knicks fan who confirmed Friday that he would attend the first NBA Finals game in New York since 1999.

zh.title: 特朗普出席NBA总决赛第三场，麦迪逊广场花园禁止携包和举办观赛派对
zh.summary: 特朗普确认将出席麦迪逊广场花园举办的NBA总决赛第三场，这是纽约自1999年以来首次举办总决赛。该场馆为这一高调出席实施了特殊的安全措施。

title: 'Bring 'em on': Delta wants United's crown over the Pacific, too
summary: Delta's president wants the carrier to challenge United's dominance on Pacific routes. This competitive move reflects strategic positioning in international aviation and growth priorities for overseas operations.
content: Delta's president, Peter Carter, told CNBC that the carrier wants to take United on over the Pacific.

zh.title: "奉陪到底"：达美航空也要挑战联合航空在太平洋航线上的地位
zh.summary: 达美航空总裁希望该航空公司挑战联合航空在太平洋航线上的主导地位。这一竞争举动反映了国际航空业中的战略定位和海外运营的增长优先级。

title: Trump storms out of interview after being challenged about election fraud claims, DOJ fund
summary: President Trump walked out of an interview after being questioned about election fraud claims and a DOJ weaponization fund. The confrontation underscores tensions over political accountability and executive power assertions.
content: The president said he would like to see the weaponization fund proceed despite setbacks.

zh.title: 特朗普因被质疑选举欺诈指控和司法部基金问题而冲出采访
zh.summary: 特朗普总统在被质询选举欺诈指控和司法部武器化基金后退出了采访。这次对抗突显了对政治问责和行政权力主张的紧张关系。

title: These are the market’s new hot stocks as investors flee from tech
summary: Investors are shifting money out of technology stocks into defensive sectors including health insurers, banks, and retailers. This rotation signals changing market sentiment about tech valuations and potential economic headwinds.
content: Investors are suddenly dumping technology stocks and rotating into other areas — including health insurers, banks and retailers.

zh.title: 随着投资者逃离科技股，这些是市场上的新热门股票
zh.summary: 投资者正在将资金从科技股转移到包括健康保险公司、银行和零售商在内的防御性部门。这种轮换反映了投资者对科技估值和潜在经济逆风的看法转变。

title: Here are the 6 big things we're watching in the stock market this week
summary: Following the end of major company earnings season, six key market developments warrant investor attention this week. The market remains dynamic despite the completion of corporate earnings reports.
content: Earnings season for Club names has come to an end, but that doesn't mean the excitement has.

zh.title: 本周股市值得关注的6大事件
zh.summary: 在主要公司财报季结束后，六项关键市场动向值得投资者本周关注。尽管企业财报已完成，市场仍保持活跃。

title: S&P 500 companies can’t stop talking about higher oil prices. But few say they’ll actually hit profits.
summary: S&P 500 companies frequently mention rising oil prices on earnings calls but only seven cited it as a reason for lowering profit guidance. The limited impact suggests energy cost pressures haven't yet significantly affected corporate earnings.
content: Only seven companies cited oil prices as a reason for cutting or not updating their profit outlooks for the year.

zh.title: 标普500公司热议油价上升，但很少有人说这会影响利润
zh.summary: 标普500公司在财报电话会议上频繁提及油价上升，但只有7家公司将其列为下调利润指引的原因。有限的影响表明能源成本压力尚未对企业利润造成重大影响。

title: Inflation inside the electronics you buy may soon become a bit more sticky
summary: A shortage of resin materials used in electronics manufacturing may drive up consumer prices for devices like smartphones. Most consumers are unaware of resin's critical role in electronics production.
content: Most consumers are not familiar with the role resin plays inside electronics like smartphones. A current shortage of the materials may push up prices.

zh.title: 你购买的电子产品中的通胀可能会变得更加持久
zh.summary: 电子产品制造中使用的树脂材料短缺可能推高智能手机等设备的消费者价格。大多数消费者不了解树脂在电子产品生产中的关键作用。

title: Women often outlive men. Here's how they should approach their long-term care needs
summary: Women typically outlive men and face higher rates of long-term care needs, making financial planning for these costs essential. Understanding gender-specific longevity risks is crucial for retirement security.
content: In addition to typically living longer than their husbands, women also are more likely to need long-term care, which can be costly.

zh.title: 女性通常寿命更长。她们应该如何应对长期护理需求
zh.summary: 女性通常寿命比男性长，面临更高的长期护理需求率，这使得为这些费用进行财务规划至关重要。理解特定性别的长期生存风险对退休安全至关重要。

title: Banco BPM invites MPS to $58 billion merger talks to form Italy's second-biggest bank
summary: Banco BPM has invited MPS into merger talks that could create Italy's second-largest bank at a $58 billion valuation. The deal could trigger additional consolidation in the Italian banking sector.
content: The announcement could kick-off a second wave of dealmaking in Italian banking after a burst of M&A activity last year.

zh.title: Banco BPM邀请MPS进行580亿美元合并谈判，以成立意大利第二大银行
zh.summary: Banco BPM已邀请MPS进行合并谈判，该谈判可能创建意大利第二大银行，估值为580亿美元。该交易可能引发意大利银行业进一步整合。

title: My husband and I are 75. We have $1.5 million in stocks and $425,000 in savings. Is that too much cash?
summary: A 75-year-old debt-free couple questions whether their $425,000 in cash savings is excessive alongside $1.5 million in stock holdings. The inquiry reflects broader retirement planning considerations around cash allocation and income needs.
content: “We are debt-free, and he will get 80% of his salary when he retires.”

zh.title: 我和丈夫都75岁了。我们有150万美元的股票和42.5万美元的储蓄。现金太多了吗？
zh.summary: 一对75岁无债务的夫妇质疑他们的42.5万美元现金储蓄是否过多，同时持有150万美元的股票。这个问题反映了围绕现金配置和收入需求的更广泛退休规划考虑。

title: Tata Steel says new £1.25bn furnace may be delayed due to electrical issue
summary: Tata Steel's £1.25 billion furnace project faces potential delays due to electrical connectivity problems. The setback could impact the company's production capacity expansion and modernization timeline.
content: Plans for £1.25bn steel-making furnace may be delayed by electrical connectivity problem, Tata says.

title: Top Wall Street analysts recommend these 3 dividend stocks for solid returns
summary: Wall Street analysts recommend three dividend stocks with attractive yields for investors seeking steady income to diversify their portfolios.
content: Investors seeking steady income can bolster their portfolios by adding dividend stocks with attractive yields.

title: 'Dean of Valuation' Aswath Damodaran is not buying SpaceX: 'Too richly priced'
summary: NYU valuation expert Aswath Damodaran argues SpaceX is overpriced despite understanding investor interest, prioritizing fundamental value over speculative trading.
content: The NYU professor said he understands why some people are getting ready to pay up for SpaceX, but he is "more investor than trader."

zh.summary: 纽约大学估值专家阿斯瓦斯·达莫达兰认为SpaceX估价过高，尽管他理解投资者的兴趣，但他优先考虑基本面价值而非投机交易。

title: M&S launches new traineeship for 1,000 young people
summary: M&S launches a new traineeship program for 1,000 young people to address the growing challenge of youth unemployment and disconnection from education and training.

zh.summary: M&S推出面向1000名年轻人的新实习项目，以应对青年失业和教育培训脱节日益严重的挑战。

title: ‘This is a tricky subject’: We’re in our 70s and our only child is 40. Do we leave her everything?
summary: A couple in their 70s seeks estate planning advice on whether to leave their entire wealth to their only 40-year-old child, reflecting broader questions about inheritance.
content: “It makes us feel uncomfortable.”

zh.title: "这是个棘手的问题"：我们年近70岁，独生女40岁。我们要把一切都留给她吗？

title: Nvidia, SK to detail cooperation plan as Huang flags prolonged chip shortage
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang and SK Hynix Chairman plan to announce a cooperation agreement as the chip industry grapples with prolonged semiconductor supply challenges.
content: A SK Hynix spokesperson said group Chairman Chey Tae-won and Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang plan to brief the media on Monday morning, confirming a report by Newsis.

title: Harry's and Coterie owner Mammoth Brands has ambitions to be the next CPG giant
summary: Mammoth Brands, the owner of direct-to-consumer brands like Harry's and Coterie, aims to become a major consumer goods company by disrupting traditional categories.
content: Mammoth's direct-to-consumer brands have helped upend the razor, diaper and deodorant categories.

title: OPEC+ set for fourth oil quota hike since Strait of Hormuz closure, sources say
summary: OPEC+ is implementing its fourth oil production quota increase since the Strait of Hormuz closure, with seven members raising output by nearly 600,000 barrels daily.
content: Seven members of OPEC+, which groups OPEC and allied producers including Russia, increased output quotas from April to June by almost 600,000 barrels per day.

zh.summary: OPEC+自霍尔木兹海峡关闭以来实施第四次石油产量配额增加，七个成员国日增产量近60万桶。

title: Russian drone hits nuclear-fuel storage facility near Chornobyl, Ukraine says
summary: Russian drones attacked a nuclear fuel storage facility near Chornobyl in what Ukraine's President called an 'extremely vile' assault, though radiation levels remained stable.
content: Ukraine's President Volodymyr Zelenskyy called it an "extremely vile" attack by Russia that did not lead to a spike in radiation.

title: Pope Leo tells 1.2 million crowd in Madrid that God stands with the poor
summary: Pope Francis told 1.2 million people in Madrid that God stands with the poor, urging world leaders to respect human dignity and end political polarization.
content: Leo said he hoped the visit would set an example to the world about respecting "every human being" and urged leaders to stop dividing electorates.

zh.title: 教宗在马德里对120万人表示上帝与穷人同在
zh.summary: 教宗在马德里对120万人表示上帝与穷人同在，敦促世界领导人尊重人类尊严，结束政治分裂。

title: South Korea nominates Han as country's first female prime minister in two decades
summary: South Korea has nominated Han to serve as the country's first female prime minister in two decades, pending parliamentary approval. The appointment marks a significant gender milestone in South Korean politics.
content: If approved by parliament, Han would become South Korea's first female prime minister in 20 years.

title: 100 days of the Iran war: How global markets and the economy have been affected, in charts
summary: As the Iran conflict approaches its 100th day, global markets and economies have experienced notable effects that reveal the geopolitical tensions' economic impact. Peace negotiations remain ongoing amid widespread economic uncertainty.
content: The conflict is about to reach its 100th day, with peace negotiations hanging in the balance.

zh.title: 伊朗战争100天：全球市场和经济如何受到影响
zh.summary: 随着伊朗冲突接近第100天，全球市场和经济经历了显著影响，反映出地缘政治紧张局势的经济冲击。在广泛的经济不确定性中，和平谈判仍在进行。

title: Global week ahead: Soccer isn't the only thing that's kicking off
summary: Beyond the World Cup opening on June 11th, the coming week will see multiple major economic and business events unfold globally. The week offers investors and markets significant catalysts beyond the soccer fever gripping fans worldwide.
content: World Cup fever grips football fans worldwide ahead of the opening game on June 11th, but it's not just soccer that's kicking off next week.

zh.summary: 除了6月11日世界杯开幕外，未来一周将在全球范围内展开多个重大经济和商业事件。这一周为投资者和市场提供了超越全球球迷足球热潮的重大机遇。

title: Golden Tempo takes 158th Belmont Stakes, winning first, third legs of Triple Crown
summary: Golden Tempo won the Belmont Stakes, capturing the first and third legs of the Triple Crown. Trainer Cherie DeVaux became only the second woman in history to train a winner in the prestigious third leg of horse racing's Triple Crown.
content: The win made Cherie DeVaux the second woman to train a winner in the third leg of horse racing's Triple Crown.

zh.title: 金色节奏赢得第158届贝尔蒙特赛 赢得三冠王第一和第三关
zh.summary: 金色节奏赢得贝尔蒙特赛马，获得三冠王的第一和第三关。训练师切瑞·德沃成为历史上第二位训练出三冠王第三关赛事冠军的女性。

title: At least 12 people shot at an Ohio festival and a search for suspects is still ongoing, police say
summary: A mass shooting at an Ohio festival left at least 12 people injured, with police still actively searching for the suspects responsible. The incident remains under active investigation.
